title: FastAPI Developer
responsibilities: design and maintain backend APIs; optimize database queries and service performance; ship reliable services with tests and monitoring
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in python, fastapi, django, postgresql, docker. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: PixelCraft is hiring a junior fastapi developer to support developing backend services, APIs, and data-driven platform features.
raw_text: Vacancy V021: FastAPI Developer at PixelCraft. Location: Lviv. Employment: contract. Required experience: 1.9 years. Required skills: python, fastapi, django, postgresql, docker, aws, redis, celery. Optional skills: prometheus, microservices, linux. Responsibilities: design and maintain backend APIs; optimize database queries and service performance; ship reliable services with tests and monitoring.
